name: rotated_l_bend_closed_cavity
description: Non-axis-aligned 2D-extruded L-bend cavity (single connected closed shell) with three STL solids: inlet, outlet, and walls. Base dimensions are 220x180x70 mm with 60 mm channel width, then rotated in 3D to stress centroid-based surface-to-solid mapping and patch-name BC auto-authoring on angled/non-orthogonal faces.

expected_outcome.qualitative_description: Flow enters through an angled inlet, turns 90 degrees around the inner L-corner, and exits through an angled outlet. Expect strong corner acceleration, a mild separation pocket near the outer bend wall, and sensitivity to non-orthogonality requiring stable nNonOrthogonalCorrectors handling in PISO.

smoke_runner.rationale: Codex rotated L-bend (Euler 15/30/20°); validates per-triangle voting + patch-normal-aware inlet U.
